text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet and I are heading back to the
academy after a day out, when...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Longer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A little longer!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You mean you want to stay out a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean... you've been looking really stressed! So
you could do with a longer break, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't work so hard! You need to, uh,
recharge your batteries! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but... don't worry about it. It's not a big
problem.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you're my trainer, right? If you wear
yourself out...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It'll affect my performance... So...
choice_data_list: Okay, let's go get something to eat!
Thanks for looking out for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Right! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! I mean... that sounds like an excellent way
to recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I could see myself joining you. But it
had better be a nice restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Make this worth my while, you hear? I'm a model
student, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy a lovely meal with a very happy Daiwa
Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, obviously! Like I just said, it'd be my
problem too!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So, well, I was thinking... maybe you should take
it easy for a little longer...
choice_data_list: How about tea in my office?
How about tea in my office?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean, hmph! How's that any different from
usual?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, fine. I suppose it's not a bad idea. And it'll be easy to explain away, too. Mm.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's settled! Let's go! You'd better have
some good snacks ready!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We share a laid-back conversation in my office
over a nice cup of tea.
